evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: fiables en termes de qualité et de disponibilité
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The quote on reliability in terms of quality and availability ('fiables en termes de qualité et de disponibilité') is explicit quality-focused language, supporting a rigour classification.
evidence.domain_risk: Customer Data Platform pour un grand retailer (8 marques / 30+ pays)
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Building a Customer Data Platform for a large retailer spanning 8 brands and 30+ countries carries significant business stakes but no explicit regulatory or financial-reporting consequence, matching moderate.
evidence.collaboration_width: utilisateurs business; data analysts; dataviz engineers
evidence.data_team_maturity: tu portes une expertise et la fait rayonner au sein du cabinet
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Carrying and spreading expertise within the consultancy ('portes une expertise et la fait rayonner au sein du cabinet') describes an established, growing practice rather than a first build, matching mid maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Migration d'une large infrastructure de dashboards basés sur un stack Supermetrics vers un stack Adverity+BigQuery
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Naming the specific migration from a Supermetrics-based stack to Adverity+BigQuery is concrete technical detail combined with more general consulting language, matching mixed authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: ton rôle est de mettre en place pour nos clients ou nos besoins internes des datasets pertinents : bien modélisés, documentés, fiables en termes de qualité et de disponibilité
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Delivering well-modeled, documented, and reliable datasets for clients or internal needs centers the role on internal data-function deliverables rather than one external commercial or product audience.
evidence.autonomy_level: tu portes une expertise et la fait rayonner au sein du cabinet et à l'extérieur et participe à la formalisation d'offres sur la base de ton expertise
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Carrying expertise externally and helping formalize service offerings involves shaping direction and offerings, while the role also includes scoped delivery work, matching a mixed autonomy level.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Construction d'une Customer Data Platform pour un grand retailer; Migration d'une large infrastructure de dashboards
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Building a new Customer Data Platform is greenfield work, while migrating an existing large dashboard infrastructure to a new stack is fix_scale, matching a mixed classification.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools, GenAI, text-to-SQL, semantic models, or AI-assisted coding; standard analytics engineering work
evidence.testing_framing: ton rôle est de mettre en place pour nos clients ou nos besoins internes des datasets pertinents : bien modélisés, documentés, fiables en termes de qualité et de disponibilité
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Candidate owns implementing datasets with explicit quality and reliability standards
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: fiables en termes de qualité et de disponibilité
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Operational reliability framing (availability, quality) without regulatory or compliance language
